overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving through the industrial district of Night City during golden hour. The journey begins at the Santa Anna intersection, navigates under massive concrete highway overpasses, passes the OCCULUS building, turns at Monte Diablo, and ends at the Ash street intersection. The scene features futuristic urban infrastructure with heavy industrial architecture and warm sunset lighting.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, vehicle begins moving forward

agents.ego_description: waiting at red light at Santa Anna intersection then proceeding straight through the crosswalk as the light changes

notable_agents.action: dark colored car waiting ahead at the intersection

massive concrete highway overpass with steel truss supports casting shadows on the road
tall yellow industrial building with scaffolding and construction elements visible on the facade
traffic signal showing red then changing to green

segments.scene_description: The video opens at the Santa Anna intersection beneath a massive concrete highway overpass during golden hour. The vehicle waits at a red light as the warm sunset illuminates the yellow industrial tower in the distance. As the light turns green, the vehicle proceeds forward through the crosswalk markings.

events.description: vehicle initiates a left turn at the intersection, steering under the overpass
completing left turn into street with commercial buildings visible

agents.ego_description: executing a left turn under the highway overpass, navigating around the concrete support pillars

entered.detail: modern commercial building with illuminated OCCULUS signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a left turn beneath the highway overpass, revealing the OCCULUS building on the left with its illuminated signage. The overpass structure shifts to the right side of the frame as the vehicle navigates through the turn, passing concrete barriers and entering a new street corridor.

events.description: entering deeper shadow beneath the stacked highway overpasses, reducing ambient light

agents.ego_description: driving straight through the industrial corridor beneath multiple layers of highway overpasses

entered.detail: large yellow industrial building with black structural framework and the number 04 visible
large illuminated digital screen displaying purple and green graphics
tall metal electrical transmission tower with multiple power lines

segments.scene_description: Driving through the industrial corridor, the vehicle passes beneath multiple stacked highway overpasses that block most of the sky, creating a low-light environment. The yellow industrial tower looms on the right while a digital billboard glows on the left. The road continues straight through the concrete canyon.

agents.ego_description: approaching the Monte Diablo intersection, navigating around the palm tree statues and turning left

tall decorative palm tree statues flanking the intersection pillars

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches the Monte Diablo intersection, marked by distinctive palm tree statues on the concrete pillars. After waiting for the traffic signal, the vehicle executes a left turn, revealing a view of the distant mountains and elevated highway ramps. Pedestrians are visible waiting at the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial road leading to Ash intersection

stopping at red light at the Ash street intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along an open road with the mountain range visible in the distance under the golden sunset. After passing through a toll gate structure, the vehicle approaches the Ash street intersection, stopping at the red light. The red warehouse building dominates the right side of the frame while the elevated highway recedes into the left distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey through a dense industrial district that shifts from an open intersection into a claustrophobic concrete canyon. It begins at the Santa Anna intersection beneath a massive highway overpass, where the vehicle waits at a red light under the warm glow of a sunset illuminating a distant yellow industrial tower. As the light turns green, the camera moves forward through crosswalk markings before executing a left turn that reveals the illuminated signage of the OCCULUS building. The scene then shifts as the vehicle enters a narrow industrial corridor, with the overpass structures moving to the right and the sky becoming increasingly obscured by stacked concrete layers. Finally, the environment transforms into a low-light canyon of steel and stone, passing a glowing digital billboard while the yellow tower looms on the right.

The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey from a dense urban intersection toward an open industrial corridor under a golden sunset. It begins as the vehicle approaches the Monte Diablo intersection, passing concrete pillars adorned with palm tree statues before executing a left turn. As the turn completes, the view expands to reveal distant mountains and elevated highway ramps while pedestrians wait at the crosswalk. The scene then shifts to an open road where the mountain range remains visible in the distance, leading the vehicle through a toll gate structure. Finally, the camera comes to a halt at the Ash street intersection, where a massive red warehouse dominates the right side of the frame as the elevated highway recedes into the distance.
